Message.SourceString: The last was taken by a rival of mine, Razlem - the deranged. A far less skilled necromancer than myself, but dangerous none the less.
Message.LocalizedString: The last was taken by a rival of mine, Razlem - the deranged. A far less skilled necromancer than myself, but dangerous none the less.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' books.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' books.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. Each time you look at the scroll, you could swear the text is different to the last time you looked.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. Each time you look at the scroll, you could swear the text is different to the last time you looked.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. It's too awful, you cannot bring yourself to read it.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. It's too awful, you cannot bring yourself to read it.

Message.SourceString: However, your assistance is still required, apprentice. Three of my secret scrolls have been stolen and you must reclaim them for me.
Message.LocalizedString: However, your assistance is still required, apprentice. Three of my secret scrolls have been stolen and you must reclaim them for me.

Message.SourceString: You make me a very undignified wizard, Abraxus. Very undignified indeed.
Message.LocalizedString: You make me a very undignified wizard, Abraxus. Very undignified indeed.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' books.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' books.

Message.SourceString: Excellent, excellent, you've found my books. I will trust you were not fool enough to peak.
Message.LocalizedString: Excellent, excellent, you've found my books. I will trust you were not fool enough to peak.

Message.SourceString: This book appears to be a grimoire of terrible curses. When you open it a crumpled note falls out.
Message.LocalizedString: This book appears to be a grimoire of terrible curses. When you open it a crumpled note falls out.

Message.SourceString: The book is written in the language of Infernus and impossible to read. However, a perfumed note is stuffed between the pages...
Message.LocalizedString: The book is written in the language of Infernus and impossible to read. However, a perfumed note is stuffed between the pages...

Message.SourceString: My dearest Abraxus, this keep is full of madmen and morons. People to whom power means strength and might, rather than unraveling the secrets of the universe.
Message.LocalizedString: My dearest Abraxus, this keep is full of madmen and morons. People to whom power means strength and might, rather than unraveling the secrets of the universe.

Message.SourceString: We are looking to create a demonic portal, that we might summon beings from another world. Imagine! We could learn so much!
Message.LocalizedString: We are looking to create a demonic portal, that we might summon beings from another world. Imagine! We could learn so much!

Message.SourceString: Yet they will just try and raise an army. Urgh! How I wish you were here with me. We could show them what a real wizard can do.
Message.LocalizedString: Yet they will just try and raise an army. Urgh! How I wish you were here with me. We could show them what a real wizard can do.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' books.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' books.

Message.SourceString: Among all the technical jargon, a note falls out.
Message.LocalizedString: Among all the technical jargon, a note falls out.

Message.SourceString:
It's your sparkling wit, your wicked smile.
With your every word, you do beguile.
Message.LocalizedString:
It's your sparkling wit, your wicked smile.
With your every word, you do beguile.

Message.SourceString: *Great scratch marks of pencil obscure the rest of the page.*
Message.LocalizedString: *Great scratch marks of pencil obscure the rest of the page.*

Message.SourceString: This book appears to be a religious dissertation on the merits of the Zamorak faith. When you open it a letter falls out.
Message.LocalizedString: This book appears to be a religious dissertation on the merits of the Zamorak faith. When you open it a letter falls out.

Message.SourceString: Dear Abraxus, I hope this letter finds you well. Dowdun Reach is proving both fascinating and infuriating in equal measure.
Message.LocalizedString: Dear Abraxus, I hope this letter finds you well. Dowdun Reach is proving both fascinating and infuriating in equal measure.

Message.SourceString: Whilst we are not limited by the prattling sensibilities of the village wizards, they replace it with a sort of blind aggression and anger against everyone.
Message.LocalizedString: Whilst we are not limited by the prattling sensibilities of the village wizards, they replace it with a sort of blind aggression and anger against everyone.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' books.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' books.

Message.SourceString: Still, I do wish you would join me. I think you might find there are wonderful secrets to uncover when one is not shackled by pointless morality.
Message.LocalizedString: Still, I do wish you would join me. I think you might find there are wonderful secrets to uncover when one is not shackled by pointless morality.

Message.SourceString: This tome writhes beneath your fingertips, as if infused with some dread spirit. It practically spits a letter out at you.
Message.LocalizedString: This tome writhes beneath your fingertips, as if infused with some dread spirit. It practically spits a letter out at you.

Message.SourceString: Dear Valerius, I am too cowardly to send this letter. Too afraid that you might burn it, or laugh at it, or worse still, ignore it. But if I do not say it now, I never will.
Message.LocalizedString: Dear Valerius, I am too cowardly to send this letter. Too afraid that you might burn it, or laugh at it, or worse still, ignore it. But if I do not say it now, I never will.

Message.SourceString: *The letter is torn in half before any more can be said.*
Message.LocalizedString: *The letter is torn in half before any more can be said.*

Message.SourceString: I've got something for you, a thank you of sorts, but you're a little overburdened. Clear out some of that backpack and then come back and see me.
Message.LocalizedString: I've got something for you, a thank you of sorts, but you're a little overburdened. Clear out some of that backpack and then come back and see me.

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' books.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' books.

Message.SourceString: The first was stolen by a wretched green dragon known as Blightscale. Arrogant creature, you must make a lesson of her hubris.
Message.LocalizedString: The first was stolen by a wretched green dragon known as Blightscale. Arrogant creature, you must make a lesson of her hubris.

Message.SourceString: What do you want? I have little time for the likes of you. Only a member of my own order can assist me and you certainly don't look the part.
Message.LocalizedString: What do you want? I have little time for the likes of you. Only a member of my own order can assist me and you certainly don't look the part.

Message.SourceString: Ah, apprentice... I assume you're an apprentice, with robes that shabby what else could you be? Still, needs must. Apprentice, I require your assistance.
Message.LocalizedString: Ah, apprentice... I assume you're an apprentice, with robes that shabby what else could you be? Still, needs must. Apprentice, I require your assistance.

Message.SourceString: Yes, yes, I know, I know. You stand in the presence of Abraxus the Eternal, master of necromancy. Keeper of secrets both occult and arcane.
Message.LocalizedString: Yes, yes, I know, I know. You stand in the presence of Abraxus the Eternal, master of necromancy. Keeper of secrets both occult and arcane.

Message.SourceString: You are very blessed, I am sure. Now, I need you to assist me. My library has been ransacked by the locals and my most precious tomes spread across the eastern parts of this region.
Message.LocalizedString: You are very blessed, I am sure. Now, I need you to assist me. My library has been ransacked by the locals and my most precious tomes spread across the eastern parts of this region.

Message.SourceString: Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your mind is too young, too limited to contain the dread secrets within! Well... hop to it!
Message.LocalizedString: Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your mind is too young, too limited to contain the dread secrets within! Well... hop to it!

Message.SourceString: Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to mail a pebble to my... to an old friend of mine. See if that will let me haunt them for a while. I am so bored of this view.
Message.LocalizedString: Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to mail a pebble to my... to an old friend of mine. See if that will let me haunt them for a while. I am so bored of this view.

Message.SourceString: Oh, but you already have my books. Are you in league with the thief, perhaps? Or are you simply more efficient than expected. No matter, your work is appreciated.
Message.LocalizedString: Oh, but you already have my books. Are you in league with the thief, perhaps? Or are you simply more efficient than expected. No matter, your work is appreciated.

Message.SourceString: I need you to find my books. Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your feeble mind cannot handle their secrets.
Message.LocalizedString: I need you to find my books. Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your feeble mind cannot handle their secrets.

Message.SourceString: I need you to find my books. Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your feeble mind cannot handle their secrets.
Message.LocalizedString: I need you to find my books. Find them, all five of them, bring them to me and -- this is crucial -- do not read them. Your feeble mind cannot handle their secrets.

Message.SourceString: The second scroll was taken by a zogre known as Ulgo. Foul creature, stinks beyond comprehension, but I'm sure you can handle it.
Message.LocalizedString: The second scroll was taken by a zogre known as Ulgo. Foul creature, stinks beyond comprehension, but I'm sure you can handle it.

Message.SourceString: Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to mail a pebble to my... to an old friend of mine. See if that will let me haunt them for a while. I am so bored of this view.
Message.LocalizedString: Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to mail a pebble to my... to an old friend of mine. See if that will let me haunt them for a while. I am so bored of this view.

Message.SourceString: In disguise are we? Blending in with the riff raff and the yobs? Not sure I agree with such a plan, but you do you.
Message.LocalizedString: In disguise are we? Blending in with the riff raff and the yobs? Not sure I agree with such a plan, but you do you.

Message.SourceString: OoooOOooOOoooOooooOoooh!
Message.LocalizedString: OoooOOooOOoooOooooOoooh!

Message.SourceString: The first was stolen by a wretched green dragon known as Blightscale. Arrogant creature, you must make a lesson of her hubris.
Message.LocalizedString: The first was stolen by a wretched green dragon known as Blightscale. Arrogant creature, you must make a lesson of her hubris.

Message.SourceString: The second scroll was taken by a zogre known as Ulgo. Foul creature, stinks beyond comprehension, but I'm sure you can handle it.
Message.LocalizedString: The second scroll was taken by a zogre known as Ulgo. Foul creature, stinks beyond comprehension, but I'm sure you can handle it.

Message.SourceString: The last was taken by a rival of mine, Razlem - the deranged. A far less skilled necromancer than myself, but dangerous none the less.
Message.LocalizedString: The last was taken by a rival of mine, Razlem - the deranged. A far less skilled necromancer than myself, but dangerous none the less.

Message.SourceString: You make me so angry Abraxus. A fire I cannot put out. I want to shout at you. I want to kick you down the stairs. I want to wrap my arms around you and scream into your chest.
Message.LocalizedString: You make me so angry Abraxus. A fire I cannot put out. I want to shout at you. I want to kick you down the stairs. I want to wrap my arms around you and scream into your chest.

Message.SourceString: You have done well my apprentice and earned something no one else has earned in centuries -- my respect.
Message.LocalizedString: You have done well my apprentice and earned something no one else has earned in centuries -- my respect.

Message.SourceString: But I am not fool enough to believe you would find such a thing sufficient for your efforts, so, here, take this instead. May it serve you well.
Message.LocalizedString: But I am not fool enough to believe you would find such a thing sufficient for your efforts, so, here, take this instead. May it serve you well.

Message.SourceString: Three of my secret scrolls have been stolen and you must reclaim them for me.
Message.LocalizedString: Three of my secret scrolls have been stolen and you must reclaim them for me.

Message.SourceString: OoooOOooOOoooOooooOoooh!
Message.LocalizedString: OoooOOooOOoooOooooOoooh!

Message.SourceString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. The writing crawls along the page making it impossible to read without strange arcane knowledge.
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of Abraxus' scrolls. The writing crawls along the page making it impossible to read without strange arcane knowledge.

Message.SourceString:
On summer days, with bluer skies,
I am oft reminded of your eyes. 
In winter nights, by the fire we roast,
And I think about what I love the most.
Message.LocalizedString:
On summer days, with bluer skies,
I am oft reminded of your eyes. 
In winter nights, by the fire we roast,
And I think about what I love the most.
